lessons.title: Create and manage background jobs using Windows PowerShell
lessons.content_md:
This module explains the three types of jobs: local jobs, Windows PowerShell remote jobs, and Common Information Model (CIM)/Windows Management Instrumentation (WMI) jobs. These job types form the basis of the Windows PowerShell job system.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/create-manage-background-jobs-use-windows-powershell/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Create and manage background jobs and scheduled jobs in Windows PowerShell
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Create and manage background jobs and scheduled jobs in Windows PowerShell**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
